description: Staged replies for safe-mode demo. Replay route loads these and runs the response parser. Replies key into outbound emails by prospectEmail (the prospect.email of the outbound email recipient).

replies.rawText: Yeah, this is exactly the leak. We lost two warm deals last month on the second touch. 15 min works — Wednesday morning?

Honestly the price is fine. The blocker is I do not have time to set up another tool right now. We've been burned twice on integrations that ate a sprint. If this is a one-evening setup, maybe. Otherwise it's a Q4 conversation.

expected.mismatchReason: Predicted pricing objection but the explicit blocker is implementation/setup time, not price.

replies.rawText: We're in a tool freeze. Not budget — we just refuse to add anything until something else gets cut. If your thing replaces a workflow we already have, send a one-pager; if it's net-new tooling, this isn't the quarter.

expected.mismatchReason: Predicted pricing objection but the actual blocker is a tool/setup freeze tied to implementation overhead.
volunteeredInfo: open if it replaces an existing workflow

replies.rawText: Pricing isn't the issue. Last year we tried three tools in this category and abandoned all of them because the setup time outran the value. If you can show me a 30-minute install path I'll look. Otherwise no.

expected.mismatchReason: Predicted pricing objection but the prospect explicitly says price isn't it; setup time is the recurring failure mode.

replies.rawText: Ha. The second follow-up is literally my Achilles heel. Yes — let's do 15 min. Mornings are better.
I'm the EA — looping in our COO who actually owns this. Please follow up with her directly going forward.
Interesting timing — we're under a Q2 budget freeze and replanning in early Q3. Ping me the first week of August and I'll find time.

volunteeredInfo: asked to be re-pinged Aug week 1
